'''latudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oladyi|oladyi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oladyi|oladyi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| latudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lætidhith|lætidhith]] || [[word:lætidhij|lætidhij]] || [[word:lætidhish|lætidhish]] || [[word:lætidhi|lætidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:latutudhuth|latutudhuth]] || [[word:latutudhuj|latutudhuj]] || [[word:latutudhush|latutudhush]] || [[word:latutudhu|latutudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:latudhuth|latudhuth]] || [[word:latudhuj|latudhuj]] || [[word:latudhush|latudhush]] || [[word:latudhu|latudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:latufdhuth|latufdhuth]] || [[word:latufdhuj|latufdhuj]] || [[word:latufdhush|latufdhush]] || [[word:latufdhuf|latufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:latudhuthu|latudhuthu]] || [[word:latudhuju|latudhuju]] || [[word:latudhushu|latudhushu]] || [[word:latudhuku|latudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:latudhuth|latudhuth]] || [[word:latudhuj|latudhuj]] || [[word:latudhush|latudhush]] || [[word:latudhu|latudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:latudhuthul|latudhuthul]] || [[word:latudhujul|latudhujul]] || [[word:latudhushul|latudhushul]] || [[word:latudhukul|latudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:latudhuthuthu|latudhuthuthu]] || [[word:latudhujuju|latudhujuju]] || [[word:latudhushushu|latudhushushu]] || [[word:latudhuku|latudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:latudhuthun|latudhuthun]] || [[word:latudhujun|latudhujun]] || [[word:latudhushun|latudhushun]] || [[word:latudhukun|latudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:latudhuthuoro|latudhuthuoro]] || [[word:latudhujuoro|latudhujuoro]] || [[word:latudhushuoro|latudhushuoro]] || [[word:latudhukuoro|latudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
